era: 1993-2002. Post-Hardcore / Mathcore. E=8 -- technical ferocity, time signature chaos, visceral. Tacoma.
members: Brian Cook (bass) -- post-Botch: These Arms Are Snakes, Russian Circles
Dave Knudson (guitar) -- post-Botch: Minus the Bear

key_album.title: We Are the Romans
key_album.label: Hydra Head Records
key_album.status: CANONICAL -- one of the most important heavy albums ever made
tracklist: To Our Friends in the Great White North
Saint Matthew Returns to the Womb
C. Thomas Howell as the 'Soul Man'
Swimming the Channel vs. Driving It
I Wanna Be a Sex Symbol on My Own Terms

mathcore_lineage.definition: Extreme music with unusual time signatures, rapid meter changes, polyrhythm, rhythmic displacement -- combined with hardcore volume and aggression
precursors: Refused (*The Shape of Punk to Come* 1998)
mathcore_lineage.converge_parallel: Jane Doe (2001) is the East Coast equivalent of We Are the Romans -- both canonical post-hardcore documents of the era

hydra_head.origin: Vehicle for Aaron Turner's band Isis (1997-2010); expanded to defining heavy music independent
hydra_head.philosophy: Non-commercial. Signed for artistic integrity, not commercial potential.

brian_cook_trajectory.significance: Cook's trajectory traces Botch's approach diffusing into post-metal/post-rock internationally. Sargent House connection bridges to Helms Alee (253).

tacoma_context.geography: 30 miles south of Seattle on Puget Sound. Industrial port city, South Sound.
tacoma_context.tacoma_narrows: Strongest tidal currents in Puget Sound. The bridge spans the Narrows.
tacoma_context.character: More working-class and industrial than Capitol Hill Seattle
tacoma_context.university_of_puget_sound: Liberal arts institution above the city. Technical ambition meets working-class ground.

theory_nodes.concept: We Are the Romans (1999) as canonical text. Eight tracks, 37 minutes. Technical complexity as emotional vehicle -- not the point but the delivery mechanism. Every serious heavy music list includes it. Grows in influence every year since release.
theory_nodes.description: We Are the Romans: canonical post-hardcore masterpiece.

theory_nodes.concept: Mathcore's defining characteristic: time signature displacement. Riff patterns change meter within a single phrase. The musician tracks multiple simultaneous rhythmic layers while maintaining hardcore attack. Botch co-authored the genre vocabulary with Dillinger Escape Plan.
theory_nodes.description: Mathcore: time signature displacement as primary technique.

theory_nodes.concept: Brian Cook trajectory as influence map. Botch (1993-2002) → These Arms Are Snakes (Seattle, 2002-2009) → Russian Circles (Chicago, 2007-present, Sargent House). The Botch approach diffuses into post-metal via Cook. Sargent House bridges Cook to Helms Alee (253).
theory_nodes.description: Brian Cook: from Botch's attack to Russian Circles' meditation.

theory_nodes.concept: Dissolution as artistic integrity. Botch dissolved in 2002 rather than continue past their creative peak. No new studio material at 2016/2022 reunions. The catalog is complete, finished, fully realized. This is the correct ending.
theory_nodes.description: Dissolution as artistic integrity: the complete catalog.

cross_references.relationship: E=7 to E=8. Sludge to post-hardcore. Capitol Hill to Tacoma. Sargent House to Hydra Head. Brian Cook bridge.
E drops to 6. Post-hardcore to stoner rock. Technical ferocity to heavy psych.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=8 vs E=3. Danger signals. Botch warns of incoming music; fog horn warns ships of solid ground. Both operate at the threshold of perception -- both demand attention.
